universe.name: Mochi Mango Retroverse
universe.description: An original neon-CRT universe celebrating three decades of broad arcade and home-game mechanics through new mascots, worlds, and stories.

games.title: Starling Signal Patrol
games.description: Guide Stella's tiny signal craft across a midnight relay field, weaving under orderly waves of static sprites and chaining rescue beacons before the grid goes dark.
games.visualStyle: Minimal phosphor-vector starfield with crisp cabinet-stencil birds, stepped formation motion, and warm amber score numerals.
games.merchHook: Stella flight-jacket patch set, glow-ink signal craft tee, enamel relay-beacon trio, and a numbered faux-cabinet marquee print.

games.title: Prism Paddle Rally
games.description: Bank a sparkling prism puck through shifting center gates while Rally Raccoon turns every long volley into a faster, brighter battle of angles.
games.visualStyle: High-contrast monochrome court upgraded with rainbow prism trails, chunky score blocks, and subtle curved-CRT bloom.
games.merchHook: Reversible Rally Raccoon sweatband, prism-puck keychain, stitched paddle pennant, and lenticular volley-trail collector card.

games.title: Lantern Labyrinth Run
games.description: Light every lantern seed in a compact midnight maze, out-turning sleepy shadow moths and timing rare moonfruit bursts to reverse the chase.
games.visualStyle: Blacklight maze lines, dot-matrix lantern seeds, friendly geometric pursuers, and hand-painted cabinet florals around the playfield.
games.merchHook: Lumi glow-plush with embroidered lantern tail, maze-map bandana, moonfruit pin set, and UV-reactive labyrinth poster.

games.title: Comet Quarry Crew
games.description: Spin Orbit Otter's salvage skiff through a wraparound quarry, splitting crystal comets into manageable shards and towing bonus ore out of danger.
games.visualStyle: Fine-line vector spacecraft and faceted comet outlines with phosphor persistence, sparse star points, and tactile instrument labels.
games.merchHook: Orbit Otter flight-cap plush, embroidered salvage-skiff patch, translucent comet-shard charms, and silver-foil quarry blueprint.

games.title: Coilberry Circuit
games.description: Guide Sprocket around a compact circuit garden, collecting electric berries to grow a luminous tail while planning safe turns through closing lanes.
games.visualStyle: Large square pixels, oscilloscope-green trails, berry-red accents, and a faux circuit-board border with glowing solder points.
games.merchHook: Bendable Sprocket desk figure, circuit-garden mouse mat, coilberry acrylic charms, and segmented tail friendship bracelet kit.

games.title: Neon Brickworks
games.description: Help Brix rebuild a glowing skyline by ricocheting a spark ball through patterned brick walls and catching construction-tool power drops.
games.visualStyle: Simple horizontal brick bands with candy-neon gradients, bright impact sparks, and a rounded woodgrain cabinet-frame motif.
games.merchHook: Brix carpenter-cap plush, modular brick magnet set, spark-ball enamel pin, and screen-printed neon skyline work shirt.

games.title: Moonbell Pin Parade
games.description: Launch a silver moon marble through Bim's musical parade table, ringing bell bumpers, opening crescent gates, and spelling bonus melodies.
games.visualStyle: Illustrated electro-mechanical table art, concentric moon targets, chrome rails, jewel lamps, and warm inked mascot flourishes.
games.merchHook: Bim bellbird plush with chime insert, moon-marble display tin, embroidered parade jacket patch, and metallic table-art print.

games.title: Turbo Toad Trackline
games.description: Thread Tavi's tiny roadster through an endless overhead track, drafting delivery vans, collecting fuel flowers, and surviving faster night sectors.
games.visualStyle: Overhead stencil cars, dashed road geometry, limited cabinet inks, speed-line phosphor streaks, and a large mechanical score strip.
games.merchHook: Tavi roadster pull-back toy, fuel-flower pin pair, trackline racing cap, and a fold-out night-sector circuit map.

games.title: Pixel Pogo Peak
games.description: Bounce Pogo Puffin up a candy-colored data mountain, steering between moving ledges, spring keys, and crumbling cloud blocks.
games.visualStyle: Chunky 16-color sprites, checkerboard cliffs, dithered skies, single-pixel highlights, and a bright home-computer title frame.
games.merchHook: Pogo Puffin plush with springy feet, pixel-peak beanie, ledge-and-key pin set, and woven 16-color summit patch.

games.title: Byte Beetle Pipeworks
games.description: Rotate chunky conduit tiles to carry rainbow data dew from Bitzi's terminal to thirsty circuit flowers before the pressure meter peaks.
games.visualStyle: Tile-based pipe graphics, cyan monitor glow, magenta status panels, animated data droplets, and playful dot-matrix interface labels.
games.merchHook: Bitzi beetle mini plush, connectable conduit desk magnets, data-dew shaker charm, and blueprint-style puzzle notebook.

games.title: Synth Snack Soundcheck
games.description: Tap glowing snack notes on the beat as Cassie tunes a rooftop synthesizer, building layered loops from soda pops, chip clicks, and jelly chords.
games.visualStyle: Synth-grid horizon, pixel equalizers, cassette-era UI blocks, luminous note lanes, and hot neon airbrush accents.
games.merchHook: Cassie keyboard scarf, snack-note enamel set, translucent synth cassette display piece, and holographic soundcheck tour tee.

games.title: Orbit Owl Starstorm
games.description: Sweep Oona's wing-shaped scout ship through layered meteor squalls, rescuing lost star chicks and assembling temporary beam patterns.
games.visualStyle: Layered parallax star bands, chunky metallic sprites, animated engine pixels, boss warning stripes, and saturated arcade gradients.
games.merchHook: Oona pilot-owl plush, wing-ship metal model, star-chick charm capsule set, and foil starstorm arcade poster.

games.title: Circuit Courier Rush
games.description: Sprint Dash Dingo across a neon motherboard metropolis, vaulting loose capacitors and delivering glowing message chips before their timers expire.
games.visualStyle: Side-view pixel city, scrolling circuit traces, chunky character animation, gradient sunset bands, and blinking delivery HUD icons.
games.merchHook: Dash courier-bag plush, embroidered message-chip patches, motherboard city desk mat, and reflective neon runner windbreaker.

games.title: Bubble Byte Brigade
games.description: Aim Bloop's byte bubbles into color clusters, banking shots off a curved monitor frame and freeing tiny helper sprites trapped overhead.
games.visualStyle: Round candy pixels, limited 8-bit shading, visible aim ticks, CRT curvature, and bubbly character portraits in a compact status bar.
games.merchHook: Bloop axolotl plush, translucent byte-bubble bag charms, helper-sprite sticker sheet, and color-cluster puzzle pouch.

games.title: Cassette Castle Climb
games.description: Hop Rewind Rabbit up a tower built from humming tape decks, using fast-forward springs and reversing broken platforms before they vanish.
games.visualStyle: Tape-deck architecture, pixel-art battlements, animated reel windows, striped loading borders, and soft magenta monitor bloom.
games.merchHook: Rewind Rabbit plush with spinning reel belly, castle mixtape case, fast-forward spring pin, and woven tape-tower wall banner.

games.title: Radish Rally Overdrive
games.description: Drift Roxy's sprout-powered roadster through glowing coastal bends, linking boost gates and dodging slapstick produce traffic.
games.visualStyle: Pseudo-3D striped roadway, horizon-scaled roadside sprites, synth sunset, oversized speed numerals, and cabinet-side airbrush produce art.
games.merchHook: Roxy racer plush, sprout-roadster pull-back toy, sunset rally cap, and reflective boost-gate decal pack.

games.title: Rooftop Rocket Rumble
games.description: Bound across rain-slick neon rooftops with Riff, collecting bottle-cap fuel and chaining wall bounces to outrun a playful clockwork storm.
games.visualStyle: Layered 32-bit city parallax, expressive outlined sprites, glossy rain reflections, comic impact bursts, and saturated gradient skies.
games.merchHook: Riff hoodie plush, bottle-cap fuel pin set, reflective rooftop jacket patch, and panoramic rain-city art print.

games.title: Polygon Penguin Grand Prix
games.description: Race Pico's low-poly snow kart around prism glaciers, hopping shortcut ramps and saving boost crystals for the final icy straight.
games.visualStyle: Bright low-poly terrain, affine-style track stripes, chunky kart silhouettes, faceted crystals, and a playful split-color racing HUD.
games.merchHook: Pico snow-kart figure, faceted boost-crystal keychain, checkered glacier scarf, and foil polygon circuit map.

games.title: Crystal Critter Cascade
games.description: Swap jewel critters into sparkling lines, triggering character-shaped power gems and cascading combo showers across Gemma's pocket cave.
games.visualStyle: Glossy pre-rendered gems, thick cartoon outlines, starburst combo typography, velvet cave gradients, and jewel-like UI frames.
games.merchHook: Gemma gerbil plush, six-color crystal charm bracelet, cascade-grid pencil case, and glitter power-gem sticker folio.

games.title: Beat Bento Breakers
games.description: Hit four colorful lanes to help Mika pack bento boxes on beat, maintaining combo heat through tempo shifts and surprise lunch-rush solos.
games.visualStyle: Four-lane arcade note highway, cel-shaded mascot poses, checkerboard food icons, bold combo splashes, and chrome-gradient interface trim.
games.merchHook: Mika rhythm-apron plush, four-lane bento pin set, chrome-logo lunch box, and lenticular combo-pose card pack.

games.title: Mecha Mochi Arena
games.description: Pilot Momo's round rescue mech through compact hologram arenas, strafing training drones and combining three modular snack-tech weapons.
games.visualStyle: Pseudo-3D hologram floor, chunky cel-shaded mech, billboard explosions, angular HUD brackets, and electric arena spotlights.
games.merchHook: Transforming Momo mech desk figure, modular snack-weapon accessory pack, arena pilot badge, and holographic blueprint sleeve.

games.title: Pocket Planet Poppers
games.description: Launch tiny worlds into matching constellations, freeing Pippa's pocket moons and triggering gravity-swirled chain reactions around the screen.
games.visualStyle: Pre-rendered toy planets, dreamy nebula gradients, sparkling orbit trails, expressive portrait panels, and polished translucent UI bubbles.
games.merchHook: Pippa pika plush with pocket moon, mini planet capsule charms, constellation sling bag, and glow-star bedroom decal set.

games.title: Skyrail Stunt Squad
games.description: Grind Ziggy's magnetic board across floating city rails, jumping signal gaps and linking spins through billboards for score multipliers.
games.visualStyle: Graffiti-bright 32-bit skyline, dynamic perspective rails, outlined mascot animation, parallax billboards, and oversized trick-callout lettering.
games.merchHook: Ziggy board-rider plush, magnetic mini skyrail set, stunt-squad patch jacket, and graffiti trick-sticker roll.

games.title: Turbo Tern Target Zone
games.description: Track pop-up clockwork targets across a seaside funfair, protecting friendly kites and building precision streaks before each rapid bonus round.
games.visualStyle: Colorful digitized-funfair backdrops, crisp target sprites, comic score bursts, camera-flash feedback, and chunky arcade crosshair graphics.
games.merchHook: Tess tern plush with visor, spinning target badge set, seaside funfair crossbody bag, and lenticular precision-streak poster.

games.title: Glitch Garden
games.description: Swap corrupted pixel plants into matching rows to restore a glitched garden before the data-scour wipes every bloom.
games.visualStyle: Neon-bright tile grid, flickering sprite flowers, CRT scan-line overlay, and a glitchy score display that stutters on combos.
games.merchHook: Gilda glitch-fairy plush, pixel-flower enamel set, CRT garden desk mat, and static-glitch sticker sheet.

games.title: Pixel Pound
games.description: Whack mischievous pixel bugs as they pop from circuit-board holes, avoid the shock hazards, and catch golden bonus frames.
games.visualStyle: Chunky pixel moles, woodgrain cabinet frame, spring-loaded hole animations, and a mechanical score reel.
games.merchHook: Pico mallet plush, pixel-bug pin trio, arcade-cabinet coaster set, and high-score patch.

games.title: Cathode Catch
games.description: Dodge falling pixel debris inside a vintage CRT tube — catch the signal bars for points, avoid the static bursts.
games.visualStyle: Phosphor-green CRT interior, falling pixel blocks, scan-line distortion, warm amber glow on catch streaks.
games.merchHook: Cathie CRT ghost plush, phosphor-green keychain, scan-line zip pouch, and retro TV art print.

games.title: Dial-Up Diner
games.description: Serve pixel burgers and shakes to dial-up customers before they disconnect — chain combos during the rush-hour lag spike.
games.visualStyle: Pixel counter with modem-status lights, 56K connection meter, squiggly order tickets, and a CRT order monitor.
games.merchHook: Midge modem-plush with blinking light, pixel burger pin set, 56K status badge, and retro diner apron.

games.title: Tape Deck Stack
games.description: Stack cassette tapes precisely on a rewinding tower — perfect drops earn bonus reels, and the tower wobbles as it grows.
games.visualStyle: Cassette tape blocks with labeled side-A labels, reel-window animations, gradient sunset background, and a boombox frame.
games.merchHook: Tuck cassette-plush with spinning reel, stackable tape magnet set, boombox sticker pack, and mixtape wall print.

games.title: Tower of Floppy
games.description: Build defensive towers from floppy disks to stop waves of corrupt data-viruses from reaching your save-file core.
games.visualStyle: Disk-drive landscape, floppy turrets with read-head cannons, pixel-data enemies, and a circuit-board path.
games.merchHook: Floppy fox plush with disk tail, floppy-tower building block set, virus-enemy pin pack, and save-core glow keychain.

games.title: Cyclops Merge
games.description: Slide moth-eyed orbs on a grid, merging identical colors into bigger eyes — reach the legendary compound eye for victory.
games.visualStyle: Glossy pre-rendered eyeball tiles, iridescent color shifts, merge-animation pupil dilations, and a dark velvet grid.
games.merchHook: Cy moth-plush with big button eyes, iridescent eye magnet set, merge-grid puzzle pouch, and compound-eye enamel pin.

games.title: Spiral Sierra
games.description: Guide a pixel ball down a spiraling CRT helix, dodging static gaps and catching color-clock power-ups to survive the descent.
games.visualStyle: Rotating spiral rings with neon gradients, pixel ball with motion blur, grid backgrounds, and a CRT tube border.
games.merchHook: Sierra pixel-ball plush, spiral-ring desk spinner, CRT glow sticker pack, and neon helix poster.

games.title: Boom Bap Cannon
games.description: Launch pixel projectiles at felt-board carnival targets — bounce shots off walls and chain bank-shot bonuses for high scores.
games.visualStyle: Retro carnival stand, felt-board target tiers, projectile arc with dotted trail, and a spring-launcher mechanism.
games.merchHook: Boom bat plush with spring wings, felt-target dartboard set, carnival-ticket pin pack, and projectile-arc tee.

games.title: Gold Rush Memory
games.description: Flip pixel mining-cart cards to find matching gold-nugget pairs — chain matches reveal a bonus motherlode tile.
games.visualStyle: Mining-cart card backs, pickaxe icons, earthy pixel cavern palette, and dusty cabinet wood trim.
games.merchHook: Nugget newt plush with gold-belly pouch, mining-card deck set, motherlode keychain, and pickaxe enamel pin.

games.title: Floppy Flap
games.description: Tap to flap a floppy disk through pixel data-pipe gaps — collect sector badges and dodge the read-error spikes.
games.visualStyle: Scrolling 8-bit pipes, floppy disk character with spin animation, sector-bonus collectibles, and a disk-drive background.
games.merchHook: Flap disk plush with floppy wings, sector-badge pin set, disk-drive sticker sheet, and endless-flier tee.

games.title: Trash Catcher
games.description: Aim pixel arrows at flying trash targets over a neon landfill — hit the rare golden can for a bonus multiplier.
games.visualStyle: Overhead pixel alley, scrolling trash-sprites, arrow trail glow, can-stack backdrop, and a carnival ticket scoreboard.
games.merchHook: Trixie trash-plush with bow accessory, pixel-can enamel pin trio, landfill target poster, and arrow-trail snapback cap.

games.title: Trawler's Catch
games.description: Cast your pixel line into a monochrome lake — hook retro fish by timing your reels, and avoid the boot hazards.
games.visualStyle: Simple lake silhouette, bobber with concentric ripples, fish shadows underwater, and a mechanical counter.
games.merchHook: Trawl turtle plush with bobber hat, pixel-fish enamel pin trio, lake-scene tea towel, and boot-hazard sticker.

games.title: Clickety Coins
games.description: Tap retro coin slots to earn digital cents, buy auto-tickers, and prestige into a neon pinball machine for massive multipliers.
games.visualStyle: Slot-machine pixel coins, neon counter sprites, upgrade panels with chunky buttons, and a CRT coin total display.
games.merchHook: Klick katydid plush with coin-pouch belly, pixel-coin keychain set, auto-ticker desk badge, and prestige-mode tee.

games.title: Neon Courtside
games.description: Swipe to aim and shoot neon basketballs through a glowing hoop — chain swishes for a hot-streak combo under the arcade lights.
games.visualStyle: Neon-outlined court, glow-in-the-dark ball, pixel crowd silhouettes, and a scrolling LED scoreboard.
games.merchHook: Nova hoops plush with mini basketball, neon-net keychain, courtside sticker pack, and LED scoreboard pin.

games.title: Bumper Crop
games.description: Ricochet a pixel seed through layered farm bricks, collecting water drops and avoiding the drought hazard tiles.
games.visualStyle: Farm-field brick layers, seed ball with bouncy animation, watering-can power-ups, and a barn-wood cabinet frame.
games.merchHook: Bumper beetle plush with seed-ball toy, farm-brick magnet set, watering-can pin, and harvest-wall art print.

games.title: Video Star
games.description: Pilot a VHS-style star fighter through a TV-static cosmos, shooting retro video-head enemies and rescuing stuck pixels.
games.visualStyle: VHS tape starfield, static-noise particles, scan-line boss patterns, and a retro TV frame around the play area.
games.merchHook: Vicky VHS plush with tape-wing cape, video-head enemy pin set, static-starfield tee, and rescue-pixel charm.

games.title: Cartridge Crash
games.description: Race a game-cartridge kart through circuit-board tracks, drifting past RAM modules and boosting on expansion-slot pads.
games.visualStyle: Pseudo-3D motherboard track, cartridge kart with label art, resistor obstacles, and a pin-connector finish line.
games.merchHook: Chip cartridge plush with rolling wheels, circuit-board track mat, RAM boost pin, and PCB art poster.

games.title: Arcade Ace
games.description: Volley a glowing pixel ball across a neon court — rallies build speed and the first to 7 points wins the cabinet crown.
games.visualStyle: High-contrast monochrome court with neon trail effects, chunky paddle sprites, and a retro score flip-display.
games.merchHook: Ace pixel plush with paddle accessory, neon-ball keychain, court-stripe snapback cap, and rally-score tee.

games.title: Boot Sector
games.description: Tap along to a chiptune boot-up sequence — hit the BIOS beeps perfectly to boot the system and unlock the hidden demo song.
games.visualStyle: Command-line interface, scrolling boot log, blinking cursor notes, CRT scan lines, and green-phosphor aesthetic.
games.merchHook: Boot bug plush with cursor antenna, BIOS beep enamel pin, chiptune sticker pack, and command-line hoodie.
